reply.text: You can either keep lying to her or

messages.text: lying to who, the burger or my trainer
the burger, that thing thinks it’s safe with you
safe is crazy, i’m its final destination
it looks juicy and terrified at the same time
same as every man in my dms honestly
i respect the bite though, zero hesitation
commitment issues but not with carbs, priorities
you are bold, i am still bored
you cant scare me off that easy
crispy, seasoned, and not emotionally undercooked
damn i was gonna show up like plain toast
toast energy matches your caption, low effort chaos
you can either keep bullying me or share fries
bullying burns calories, sharing adds them, do math
let me take you out this week
